info.title: validate-slnf: A tool to validate that Visual Studio Solution Filter (.slnf) files have not fallen out of date

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Print detailed information about the validation process

options.name: --skip-solution-check
options.description: Skip checking if projects exist in the parent solution file (.sln or .slnx)

options.name: --skip-disk-check
options.description:
Skip checking if projects exist on disk
Exit codes:
0: All checks passed (or no .slnf files found)
1: One or more checks failed
